goal: Add CRUD methods to BookmarkStore in models.py: add(url, title, tags=None) -> Bookmark (creates and saves a new bookmark, returns it), get(bookmark_id) -> Bookmark or None, delete(bookmark_id) -> bool (returns True if found and deleted), list_all() -> list[Bookmark] (returns all bookmarks). Each method should call _load/_save internally. Include type hints.
verify: python3 -c 'import os, json; os.remove("test_crud.json") if os.path.exists("test_crud.json") else None; from models import BookmarkStore; s=BookmarkStore("test_crud.json"); b=s.add("https://a.com","A"); assert s.get(b.id).title=="A"; assert len(s.list_all())==1; assert s.delete(b.id)==True; assert len(s.list_all())==0; os.remove("test_crud.json"); print("crud OK")'
